title: Friday Bar – Building B, Ground Floor (Stuen)
description: Join us for a relaxed Friday afternoon at the student bar. There will be music, cheap drinks, and a chance to hang out with other students. It’s a good way to unwind after a busy week and meet people from different study programs.
practicalInfo: Valid student ID required for entry
Drinks available for purchase (cash and card accepted)

title: AAU Basketball Training
description: Weekly basketball training session for all skill levels. Come improve your game and meet new teammates.

title: Book Club Meetup
description: Monthly book club meeting where we discuss this month’s selected book and share thoughts.
